properties.name: code
properties.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. "GB", "UK", "US"). When set, the component shows the matching flag (from [flag-icons](https://github.com/lipis/flag-icons)) and the code (e.g. "UK") automatically.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Optional text to show instead of the country code (e.g. "Saint Helena" for "SH"). Useful for less familiar codes.
